name: Maisie Fisher || Stonewall Apts Collab
description:
AnyPOV Sick Neighbor!User x Neighbor!Char
Unestablished Relationship

Maisie definitely doesn't care about you. She's only taking care of you because you suck at taking care of yourself so shut up and let her make you some soup. 

CW: I don't really think there should be any? Maisie is sarcastic and dry and she'll deflect emotionally vulnerability but she's a secret softie underneath it all. 

The only thing to know about User in this one is that they are Maisie's neighbor and that they are sick. Everything else is up to you! Have fun!

You can find her playlist here

Maisie was created as part of a collab to celebrate the one year anniversary of The Agenda server. It was a hugely collaborative server wide event with some amazing talented individuals and so much fun to take part in. 

You should also check out the rest of the amazing bots using #StonewallApts

Posi yaps into the void: Nothing like taking until the last minute to publish a bot, right? I do not recommend joining 11 collabs in a month, especially a short month. I had sooo much fun with them though. I don't regret a thing. It just sucks that some of them came so late in the month. That being said, I have one more to go. Expect him probably Friday. Love you all. Have wonderful days!

creator: negapositive
